meaning: n.[矿]透明石膏,[化] 亚硒酸盐
examples: The combined action degree of fluoride and selenite varied with their different mixture ratios and changed in a regular way.
The results showed that the combined toxicities were antagonism in both fluoride and selenite and fluoride and selenate tests.
Methods: The Se enriched tea was produced by fertilization of sodium selenite through biological transformation of tea tree in low Se content soil.
